Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms on Details tab
Expected Result: Account record opens; Details tab shows Billing Address and Payment Terms (soft-fail logged if missing)

Scenario: Create new Contact on the Account via Contacts related list
Expected Result: Contact created and contactUrl captured; record URL contains /Contact/

Scenario: Create Opportunity from Contact and verify Primary Contact Role
Expected Result: Opportunity created from Contact; Contact Roles related list shows contact as Primary

Scenario: Create Quote with Products via Catalog, Accept Quote, and create Activated Contract
Expected Result: Quote created with product line items; status set to Accepted; Contract created with Activated status and 12-month term

Scenario: Create Order from Quote and Activate to Complete
Expected Result: Order created via Create single Order; Activate clicked; Order marked as Complete
